title: Decision record: run_on_new_thread for sync AWS client construction
description:
## Decision
AWS backends (aws-sm, aws-ssm, aws-kms) construct their SDK clients synchronously via run_on_new_thread(), which spawns an OS thread with its own single-threaded tokio runtime.

## Rationale
aws_config::load_from_env() is async. Calling block_in_place() or block_on() from within an existing tokio runtime risks deadlock on single-threaded runtimes and panics on current_thread runtimes. Spawning a fresh OS thread with its own runtime sidesteps the runtime-detection problem entirely. The cost is one thread creation per client construction, which happens once at startup.

## Record this as a confirmed good decision.
